refined_fr.refined_fr: Provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle identification, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly address the key components of worksite mapping: terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation, which are critical for accurate modeling and safety.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a comprehensive digital worksite model/map that includes terrain features, obstacle locations, and delineated work zones, validated against ground truth data and stakeholder acceptance.
sub_frs: FR1: Map terrain features of the worksite accurately.
FR2: Identify and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the site.

candidate_dps: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle mapping.
Apply GIS-based digital mapping for work-zone representation.
Integrate sensor data with real-time processing algorithms for dynamic updates.
selected_dp.selected_dp: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion combined with GIS-based digital mapping and real-time processing algorithms to generate and update the worksite model including terrain, obstacles, and work zones.

potential_sources: Sensor data fusion tightly coupled with mapping algorithms.
Real-time updates require close integration between data acquisition and processing.
coupling_check.notes: The DP logically groups sensing and mapping functions to minimize cross-domain dependencies and supports modular updates.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors in harsh worksite conditions.
Risk of data latency impacting real-time model accuracy.
Assumes GIS data can be integrated with sensor data effectively.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing sensor fusion and GIS mapping separately if real-time constraints become critical.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized processing and integration of sensor data, mapping algorithms, and worksite model generation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data (LIDAR, camera) and vehicle status for mapping.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Provides updated worksite model data to planning and execution modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote systems and teleoperation modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as mapping is core to NGHE solution; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module contains sensors but limited processing; high diffusion risk if mapping logic placed here.
Not suitable for mapping processing; would cause high diffusion.
Safety services consume mapping data but do not generate it.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports integration with planning and execution functions.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large or complex.
Dependency on reliable telemetry data input from Vehicle module.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module size and consider splitting mapping processing if complexity grows; ensure robust telemetry interface.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping from terrain, obstacle, and work-zone analysis to sensor fusion and GIS mapping.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk by centralizing mapping in NGHE Solution module.
Telemetry interface dependency is well defined.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best ownership candidate for the DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by validating the generated worksite model against ground truth and stakeholder requirements.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to DP and DP to IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Review telemetry data quality and latency impacts.
Plan for modularization if NGHE Solution module complexity increases.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements and constraints with acceptable risk and clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Map terrain features of the worksite accurately.
FR2: Identify and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the site.

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Sensor data is reliable and timely.
Telemetry interface supports required data throughput.
open_risks: Data latency affecting real-time model accuracy.
Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Sensor data quality and latency measurements.
